headings: (c) All of that property located at 789 Some Street, Bryan, TX 77801
text: EIGHTH: Freight charges on all shipments to the project must be prepaid. No extra work or changes under this Subcontract will be recognized or paid for unless agreed to in writing before the Subcontractor's Work is started. The Subcontractor must submit a written request for any such change in the time and manner provided for in the Subcontract Documents, and shall specify in detail the extra work or changes desired, the price to be paid or the amount to be deducted, should said changes decrease the amount to be paid, which shall be agreed upon prior to starting work on the change. Any additional or changed work and materials furnished by the Subcontractor prior to obtaining such approval will be at its own expense. Any disputes as to the value of the extra work or changes shall be determined by the Architect whose decision shall be final and binding upon the parties hereto. Subcontractor is always responsible for taking such measurements as will insure the proper matching and fitting of the Subcontractor's work.
